name: Toasted-Coconut Rum Banana Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 9 1/2 x 5 1/2 inch loaf pan or three 5 3/4 x 3 1/2-inch loaf pans. In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar. Beat in eggs, rum, and almond extract. In another bowl, stir together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt, then add to the creamed mixture. Blend in the mashed banana and toasted coconut. Pour into prepared pan(s). Bake 55 to 60 minutes for the large loaf, or 45 to 55 minutes for the smaller loaves, until done when tested with a toothpick. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning onto a rack.
